PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?attendance WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q1363275 ; wdt:P580 ?start .
  FILTER(YEAR(?start) >= 1977 && YEAR(?start) <= 2009)
  .
  ?series wdt:P1545 ?game .
  ?game wdt:P710 wd:Q334634 ; wdt:P710 wd:Q650840 .
  ?game wdt:P1135 ?attendance .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?attendance)
LIMIT 1
